title: Lead Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Gaurs Group Advisory Limited:
Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group Advisory Limited!
